description: Final CI validation, documentation update, and push. Ensure all tests pass, lint is clean, e2e tests still build, push the feature branch, and verify CircleCI pipeline passes.
steps: Run go test ./... to verify all tests pass
Run golangci-lint run ./... to verify no lint issues
Run go build ./... to verify clean compilation
Update docs/spec-port-init-scripts.md with any changes made during implementation (implementation notes, deviations from plan)
Update README.md if needed to reflect the new init architecture
Commit any final documentation updates with message 'docs: update spec with implementation notes'
Review git log to ensure all commits follow conventional commit syntax
Push the feature branch to origin
Check CircleCI pipeline status using the CircleCI MCP server tools (project slug: gh/petercb/k3os-bin, branch: feat/port-init-scripts)
If CI fails, read the failure logs, fix issues, and re-push until green
acceptance_criteria: CircleCI pipeline passes on the feature branch
All commits follow conventional commit format
verification: Check CircleCI pipeline status for branch feat/port-init-scripts
findings: All validation passed: go test ./... (all pass), golangci-lint run ./... (0 issues), go build ./... (clean). Documentation updated with implementation notes covering architecture, deviations, and testing approach.
